summary: Usage History Bug Fix Verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend (12/12 passed) and Frontend (all flows verified). The usage-history API now returns ONLY service categories (no Burns, Admin debits, or Other). The total_used from usage-history MATCHES total_redeemed from redeem-limit API exactly (48,646.52 PRC for primary user, 34,369.47 PRC for PRC user).

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - may need minWidth/minHeight props on Recharts component (non-blocking, chart renders correctly)

critical_code_review_comments: usage-history API correctly queries 17 service-specific collections (recharge_requests, bank_transfers, subscription_payments, etc.)
Burns and admin transactions are properly excluded from usage-history
by_category field contains only service categories: Subscription, Gift Cards, Bank Redeem, Bill Pay, Shopping, Redeem, Loan EMI
total_used from usage-history MATCHES total_redeemed from redeem-limit API exactly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Usage history bug fix verified. The usage-history API now correctly returns ONLY service categories (Mobile Recharge, Bank Redeem, Gift Cards, Subscription, Bill Pay, Shopping, Redeem, Loan EMI) - NO Burns, Admin debits, or Other categories. The total_used from usage-history matches total_redeemed from redeem-limit exactly. Frontend shows 'Redeem Used Details' title, Total Redeemed card, Redeem Breakdown with category icons and progress bars, Monthly Redeem Usage chart, and expandable Date-wise Redeem Details.

backend_apis.usage_history_no_burns: PASS - by_category contains only service categories (no Burns/Admin/Other)
backend_apis.usage_history_required_fields: PASS - summary, graph_data, daily_breakdown all present
backend_apis.graph_data_structure: PASS - month, total, count fields present
backend_apis.daily_breakdown_structure: PASS - date, total, entries with time/amount/category/narration

frontend_flows.used_prc_link: PASS - data-testid='used-prc-link' found, text shows 'Used ›- 48,647 PRC'
frontend_flows.redeem_breakdown: PASS - Shows only service categories with icons and progress bars
frontend_flows.monthly_chart: PASS - Monthly Redeem Usage chart renders (Mar '26, Apr '26 bars visible)
frontend_flows.daily_breakdown: PASS - Date-wise Redeem Details with 4 expandable date rows

bug_fix_validation.original_issue: Dashboard USED showed 39,047 PRC but Usage History page showed 71,288 PRC (included burns)
bug_fix_validation.fix_applied: usage-history API rewritten to query service-specific collections only, excluding burns and admin transactions
bug_fix_validation.validation_result: PASS - usage-history total_used now matches redeem-limit total_redeemed exactly
